prose: Most electrophilic site in benzaldehyde by the Fukui-plus (f+) index — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP with density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: fixed from the user-supplied benzaldehyde.xyz (no optimization). SCF converged cleanly with no warnings. Mulliken Fukui-plus indices were computed from the neutral and cationic states; the maximum f+ = 0.39938970 occurs at atom 3 (carbon).
